home.desc: Professional, fast, and free financial calculators to help you plan investments, manage debt, and track returns.
home.c_d: Visualize how your money grows over time with the power of compounding.
home.l_d: Plan your mortgage or personal loan payments. See exact amortization schedules.
home.r_d: Calculate the Return on Investment for your business decisions.
home.meta_d: Calculate your financial future with our free, high-performance calculators. No sign-up required.

comp.desc: Discover the power of compounding and plan your financial wealth.
comp.hw_d: Compound interest is calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods.
comp.meta_d: Calculate how your money can grow over time.

loan.desc: Plan your debt payoff strategy and calculate complete amortization schedules.
loan.hw_d: A loan amortization schedule shows precisely how much of your payment goes towards the principal versus interest.
loan.meta_d: Calculate your monthly mortgage or loan payments and view schedules.

roi.desc: Quickly evaluate the performance and profitability of your investments.
roi.wi_d: ROI is a performance measure used to evaluate the efficiency or profitability of an investment.
roi.af_d: Annualized ROI accounts for the holding period, making it easier to compare investments.
roi.meta_d: Calculate the return on investment and annualized ROI for your ventures.

legal.cd: Have questions, feedback, or need to report an issue? We'd love to hear from you.
legal.cr_d: For any inquiries, business proposals, or technical support, drop us an email.
legal.p1: We respect your privacy. Our calculators run entirely on your client device. We do not collect or transmit your financial inputs to our servers.
legal.t1: All calculations, projections, and reports generated are for informational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice.
legal.a1: We believe that financial literacy and planning should be accessible to everyone globally, without sign-ups or tracked data.
legal.d1: We are not financial advisors. The interactive calculators are designed to be approximate estimates only.

sc.inv_t: What is the return on {{amount}} at {{rate}}% for {{years}} years?
sc.inv_d: Discover the future value of a {{amount}} investment returning {{rate}}% annually over {{years}} years.
sc.loan_t: Monthly payments for a {{amount}} loan at {{rate}}% for {{years}} years
sc.loan_d: Calculate the monthly payment and total interest of a {{amount}} loan at {{rate}}% over {{years}} years.
